message:
security: fix critical vulnerabilities in HTTPS tarball feature download

Addressed multiple security issues in the downloadHTTPSFeature function:

1. HTTP Client Timeout (CRITICAL)
   - Added 30-second timeout to HTTP client to prevent indefinite hangs
   - Previously used default http.Get() with no timeout

2. Request Size Limit (CRITICAL)
   - Implemented 100MB maximum size limit using io.LimitReader
   - Prevents disk/memory exhaustion from unbounded downloads
   - Returns clear error when size limit exceeded

3. Content-Type Validation (IMPORTANT)
   - Added validation for expected tarball content types
   - Accepts: application/x-gzip, application/gzip, application/x-tar,
     application/x-compressed-tar, application/octet-stream
   - Rejects invalid content types to prevent malicious files

4. Tarball Path Traversal Protection (IMPORTANT)
   - Ensured tar extraction doesn't use -P flag
   - Relies on tar's default behavior of stripping absolute paths
   - Added comment documenting security rationale

5. Test Infrastructure Improvement (IMPORTANT)
   - Replaced external server dependency with httptest.Server
   - Test now creates tarball programmatically for self-contained testing
   - Eliminates flaky tests from external dependencies

All tests pass. No functional changes to user-facing behavior.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
